summary: Fix Ricardo Peralta's missing photo in the testimonials carousel by setting the correct Firebase Storage URL in Testimonials.astro.
problem_statement: Testimonial #3 (Ricardo Peralta, initials 'RP') had photo set to undefined, causing the fallback initials avatar to display instead of his real photo.
solution: Replace `photo: undefined` with the provided Firebase Storage URL for Ricardo Peralta's photo in the testimonials data array inside Testimonials.astro.

files_changed.change: Changed `photo: undefined` to `photo: 'https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com/v0/b/aconcagua-co.firebasestorage.app/o/PHOTO-2026-03-23-23-37-24.jpg?alt=media&token=004ecdb3-7700-4258-86b6-d5798f6ff41c'` for testimonial #3 (Ricardo Peralta)

constraints: Only the photo URL for Ricardo Peralta was changed

manual_steps: Confirm photo is displayed instead of initials 'RP'
